{{Quote|<nowiki></nowiki>''Millennium Falcon'', this is Captain Talpron, leading Squadron Two, Corellian Space Defense Forces Space Service. Are you all right?|Talpron|<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" />}}
[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] '''Talpron''' was a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] in the [[Corellian Defense Forces Space Service]]. He led [[Squadron Two (Corellian Defense Forces Space Service)|Squadron Two]] at the time of the [[Corellian Crisis|First Corellian Insurrection]], in which the CDF space forces joined with the insurgents, while the CDF ground forces formed a loyalist faction. Talpron participated in an elaborate ruse designed to project an image of trustworthiness on the part of the CDF, in which a staged attack upon the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] by [[Ugly/Legends|Uglies]], purported to be space pirates, was to be thwarted by CDF [[Pocket Patrol Boat]]s. The ruse went awry when [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] came out of hyperspace ahead of the designated coordinates.<ref name="Ambush at Corellia" />
